findings.detail: Two-file scope matches D1 NEVER, D2 NOT, and handoff constraints exactly.
All paths match handoff section 9 and D10 directory structure.
IN-001 zero-arg and OUT-001 exact pong correctly captured. D4 JSON example correctly interpreted as documentation.
One test matches handoff section 6. No synthetic inflation.
Builder explicitly flags code-before-test as a violation. Will follow handoff step order.
Zero integration surface correctly stated. Matches D1 Article 5 and D10 pattern 4.
Manifest expectations describe constraints, not a file creation requirement. Builder interpretation correct.
Fail-fast modes, semantic audit, and overbuild risk all correctly identified.
